items.title: 2 Dividend Stocks and 1 ETF Up Between 8% and 11% That Are Screaming Buys Before the New Year
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article highlights three investment options - Sherwin-Williams, Air Products and Chemicals, and the Global X MLP ETF - that have seen gains between 8% and 11% this year and are considered good buys before the new year. The article provides analysis on the growth potential and dividend prospects of these investments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Sherwin-Williams' strong performance, industry-leading position, and potential for continued growth and dividend increases, making it a good investment option.
The article praises Air Products' consistent cash flow, sustainable dividend payout, and growth opportunities in the hydrogen market, making it an attractive dividend stock.

The article cites favorable market conditions, such as the continued importance of hydrocarbons and the potential for a more fossil-fuel-friendly administration, as reasons why the Global X MLP ETF is a good investment option.
